summary: Frontend-only testing completed for The Doggy Bakery e-commerce site. All key features tested and working: Homepage with 200+ products, Mira AI chatbot with city selection flow, WhatsApp integration, and checkout flow with WhatsApp confirmation.

issues: ref.current cleanup warning in useAnimations.js - minor React hooks warnings

critical_code_review_comments: ProductCard.jsx correctly handles undefined sizes/flavors with fallback defaults (lines 9-12)
MiraAI.jsx services flow properly asks for service type first, then city (lines 198-300)
WhatsApp number correctly stored as 919663185747 in Footer.jsx and Checkout.jsx
All product data is MOCKED in mockData.js - no real backend/Shopify integration
seed_data_creation: None - all data mocked in mockData.js
context_for_next_testing_agent: This is a frontend-only React application with all product data mocked in mockData.js. No backend API testing needed. Key features verified: 1) Homepage loads with 36 dog cakes, 200+ total products 2) Mira AI chatbot opens and services flow works with city selection (Bangalore, Mumbai, Gurgaon, Delhi) 3) WhatsApp floating button and footer button work with number +91 96631 85747 4) Checkout flow shows WhatsApp confirmation after order placed

homepage_load.details: Homepage loads with 10 featured product cards, product images, size buttons, flavor dropdowns

product_cards.details: 36 product cards on cakes page, sizes (500g, 1kg, Party, Hamper, Premium) and flavors displayed correctly

mira_ai_chatbot.details: Sparkle button opens Mira AI chat widget, services flow works: Find trusted services -> Veterinary care -> City selection (Bangalore, Mumbai, Gurgaon, Delhi) -> Shows vet results

whatsapp_floating_button.details: Green WhatsApp button in bottom left with data-testid='whatsapp-float-btn', clickable and opens WhatsApp

whatsapp_footer_button.details: Footer contains 'WhatsApp Us' button, phone number 9663185747, email woof@thedoggybakery.com

checkout_flow.details: Add to cart -> Proceed to Checkout -> Fill form -> Place Order -> Order confirmation with 'Confirm on WhatsApp' button (data-testid='whatsapp-confirm-btn')

whatsapp_order_confirmation.details: Order confirmation page shows WhatsApp number +91 96631 85747 and 'Confirm on WhatsApp' button

mocked_apis_note: ALL PRODUCT DATA IS MOCKED in /app/frontend/src/mockData.js - No real backend or Shopify integration. This is a demo/birthday site.
